meaning: adj.未社会化的 不适应社会生活(或需要)的
examples: They were unsocialized, never having been inside a building of any kind or known a pat on the head.
There are some pet stores that buy their puppies from commercial kennels regulated by the Department of Agriculture. However, even these pups tend to be unhealthy and unsocialized.
Unsocialized but erudite, a moralist, a theorist, a swamp-bred crank, Laroche fascinates the melancholy Orlean, who feels her life lacks a consuming passion.
